title: helianthus paradoxus subsp. cuatrocienegensis
intro: Helianthus paradoxus subsp. cuatrocienegensis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the sunflower plant, specifically found in the Cuatro Cienegas region of Mexico. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus paradoxus subsp. cuatrocienegensis include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
